Title: Register Buyer Account
Steps: 1. Open /register 2. Enter valid buyer details 3. Submit form
ExpectedResult: Buyer account is created, user is redirected to /home, session token is stored

Title: Register Farmer With Complete Profile
Steps: 1. Open /register 2. Select farmer role 3. Enter profile and payment details 4. Submit form
TestData: name=Farmer One; email=farmer1@example.com; password=Password@123; region=Erode; crops=turmeric,banana; upiId=farmer@upi; ifsc=SBIN0000001
ExpectedResult: Farmer account is created, profile is saved, user lands on /home with Sprint 2 summary visible

Title: Block Farmer Registration Without Region
Steps: 1. Open /register 2. Select farmer role 3. Leave region empty 4. Submit form
ExpectedResult: Form stays on page and required validation prevents submission

Title: Block Farmer Registration Without Crops
Steps: 1. Open /register 2. Select farmer role 3. Leave crops empty 4. Submit form
ExpectedResult: Form stays on page and required validation prevents submission

Title: Reject Duplicate Email
Preconditions: User with target email already exists
Steps: 1. Open /register 2. Enter an already-used email 3. Submit form
ExpectedResult: User sees duplicate email error and no new account is created

Title: Login With Valid Buyer Credentials
Steps: 1. Open /login 2. Enter valid email and password 3. Submit form
ExpectedResult: User is redirected to /home and login success message is displayed

Title: Login With Invalid Password
Steps: 1. Open /login 2. Enter wrong password 3. Submit form
ExpectedResult: User remains on login page and invalid credential error is shown

Title: Protect Home Route When Logged Out
Steps: 1. Directly open /home
ExpectedResult: Application redirects user to /login

Title: Forgot Password Generates Demo Token
Preconditions: Existing user account available; user logged out
Steps: 1. Open /forgot-password 2. Enter email 3. Submit form
ExpectedResult: Success message appears and demo reset token is displayed

Title: Reset Password With Valid Token
Steps: 1. Open /reset-password 2. Enter email, token, and new password 3. Submit form
ExpectedResult: Password is changed, session is stored, and user is redirected to /home

Title: Farmer Home Shows Profile Status
Steps: 1. Open /home
ExpectedResult: Home page shows Sprint 2 cards for farmer profile and payment details with current status

Title: Buyer Home Shows Buyer Messaging
Steps: 1. Open /home
ExpectedResult: Home page shows buyer account summary and indicates farmer-specific setup is not required

Title: Create Farmer Profile After Login
Preconditions: Logged in as farmer without profile
Steps: 1. Open /farmer-profile 2. Enter region, crops, bio, UPI, and bank details 3. Save
ExpectedResult: Profile save succeeds and success message is displayed

Title: Update Existing Farmer Profile
Preconditions: Logged in as farmer with existing profile
Steps: 1. Open /farmer-profile 2. Modify crops or payment details 3. Save 4. Refresh page
ExpectedResult: Updated details persist after refresh

Title: Buyer Cannot Open Farmer Profile Page
Steps: 1. Navigate to /farmer-profile
ExpectedResult: User sees authorization error explaining only farmers can create/update farmer profiles

Title: Farmer Profile Page Handles Setup Redirect
Preconditions: Logged in as newly created farmer redirected with setup=pending
Steps: 1. Open /farmer-profile?setup=pending
ExpectedResult: Page displays completion guidance telling the user to finish profile and payment setup

Title: Top Navigation Menu Works On Protected Pages
Preconditions: Logged in as any valid user
Steps: 1. Open /home 2. Open profile menu 3. Navigate to Home, Reports, Support, Logout
ExpectedResult: Topbar remains visible, links navigate correctly, logout clears session

Title: Site Background Renders Across Main Screens
Steps: 1. Open /login 2. Open /register 3. Log in and open /home
ExpectedResult: Pages render layered background gradients and overlays without reducing card readability

Title: Responsive Layout Works On Mobile Width
Steps: 1. Open browser dev tools 2. Set width to mobile viewport 3. Check /login, /register, /home, /farmer-profile
ExpectedResult: Cards stack cleanly, hero section collapses to one column, forms remain usable

Title: Seeded Demo Accounts Can Log In
Steps: 1. Open /login 2. Test seeded farmer account 3. Test seeded buyer account
ExpectedResult: Both seeded accounts authenticate successfully and land on the home page
